results.notes: REQ-001 through REQ-007 mostly map to implementation; REQ-008 promotion gates map only to advisor_validate slices, not the claimed gate-bundle artifact; REQ-010 remains open.
16 of 16 completed CHK items lack file:line citations; examples enumerated in iteration markdown.
Advisor catalog exists, but derived_generated weight is documented as 0.10 while runtime weights-config uses 0.15.
Corrupt DB recovery, daemon restart, and unavailable/absent modes have playbook coverage; external public scan caller authority is missing.
Six root-doc runtime package references use mcp_server/skill-advisor while runtime uses mcp_server/skill_advisor.
Only ADR-001 exists; public scan trust model and separate promotion-gate contract are implicit.
Python/plugin/TS references are present but mix stale legacy paths with current mcp_server/skill_advisor and plugin bridge locations.
All four requested active issue invariants lack targeted regression tests, producing DR-008-D3-P1-001.
